notes:
### v1.3.10

#### Added
- Local time display with Discord timestamp below for Raid Management ongoing events
- Improved leader display positioning in Raid Management preview

#### Fixed
- Raid Management sign-up counting to include leaders in total counts
- Removed 'any' role option for raid-train runs to prevent confusion
- Automatic conversion of 'any' role to 'dps' when switching to raid-train
- Raid-train pre-registration prevents duplicate role assignments

#### Technical
- Added formatLocalDateTimeDisplay() helper for Discord timestamp conversion
- Updated getSheetMembers to include leaders in role filtering
- Reordered leader icon display to appear behind name in preview
